headline: A Look At Aptiv (APTV) Valuation After Profit Turnaround And New Automation Partnership
summary: Aptiv (APTV) has drawn fresh attention after reporting first quarter 2026 results that shifted from a loss to a profit, updating its Q2 and full year outlook, and announcing an automation-focused collaboration with Comau. See our latest analysis for Aptiv. Despite the Q1 profit rebound, updated 2026 outlook and new Comau automation collaboration, Aptiv’s share price return has been weak, with the stock down 34.93% over 90 days and total shareholder return down 52.96% over five years,...
